headline: Tyrique George
body: Tyrique George has completed a permanent transfer to Premier League club Everton. We thank Ty for his efforts throughout his time at Chelsea and wish him every success as he begins a new chapter in his career. Link READ MORE 📰 chelseafc.com
raw_text:
Tyrique George has completed a permanent transfer to Premier League club Everton.

We thank Ty for his efforts throughout his time at Chelsea and wish him every success as he begins a new chapter in his career.
